stories.headline: 'Top Gun: Maverick' Actor James Handy Died From Stab Wound and Neck Compression - TMZ
stories.summary: James Handy died from a stab wound, the Los Angeles Medical Examiner confirmed.

stories.headline: David Hockney obituary: A genius in practically every medium - BBC
stories.summary: The proud Yorkshireman who also painted iconic pictures of America, was routinely described as Britain's greatest artist.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift Seems to Brush Off Jimmy Jam at Songwriters Hall of Fame - TMZ
stories.summary: Taylor Swift seemed to brush off Jimmy Jam at Thursday's Songwriters Hall of Fame — telling the R&B legend she was having trouble holding a conversation with him.

stories.headline: Rick James' Son Tazman Johnson In Jail, Facing Drug Charges - TMZ
stories.summary: Rick James' son, Tazman Johnson, is currently locked up in the Los Angeles County Jail facing serious drug charges involving Fentanyl ... TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: Quavo: Valet Allegedly Slapped By Rapper Moving to Collect $1 Million Judgment - TMZ
stories.summary: The Vegas valet who says Quavo slapped him is on the hunt to collect the 7-figure sum he won in court from the Migos member ... TMZ has learned.

stories.headline: Horoscope for Friday, June 12, 2026 - Chicago Sun-Times
Taylor Swift Thanks Family, Tears Up at Songwriters Hall of Fame 2026 - Variety
stories.summary: Taylor Swift thanked her family for making sacrifices during her acceptance speech at the Songwriters Hall of Fame 2026.

stories.headline: Olivia Rodrigo, pop princess of vengeful angst, tries her hand at love songs - NPR
stories.summary: Ditching the punchy pop punk of Guts to play with a soft '80s pop and New Wave-indebted sound, her new LP is about the life cycle of her first "real, big girl" relationship. The result is bittersweet.
